## Tracking And Checkout

- [ ] Landing, quiz, lead, offer, checkout, and purchase attribution remains intact
- [ ] No analytics, cookie, payment, migration, workflow, or environment files changed
- [ ] Any price or plan-ID change is called out for engineering ownership
- Tracking/payment notes: None

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run funnel:check`
- [ ] `npm run test:node`
- [ ] `npm run ci:verify`
- [ ] I understand fork PRs do not receive production secrets, so live Supabase, AI, and provider-backed checks may report a visible skip

## Activation

- [ ] Package status and campaign launch timing are explicit
